learnings.insight: TypeScript with ESM (NodeNext module resolution) works well for multi-file AI agent architectures
learnings.evidence: X2000 compiled successfully with 11 modules, 0 type errors
learnings.application: Use NodeNext module resolution and .js extensions in imports for TypeScript projects

learnings.insight: 5-layer guardrails architecture (Input, Action, Runtime, Visibility, Escalation) provides comprehensive safety without blocking legitimate work
learnings.evidence: Implemented in X2000 guardrails/layers.ts - covers validation, permissions, rate limits, audit, and human-in-the-loop
learnings.application: Use this 5-layer pattern for any autonomous AI system that needs safety guardrails
